---
title: "Evaluating Personal Job Market Prospects in 2024"
subtitle: "Final Report"
author:
  - name: Manjari Kannan
    affiliations:
      - ref: bu
  - name: Nicholas Decesaris
    affiliations:
      - ref: bu
  - name: Oscar Quintero
    affiliations:
      - ref: bu
affiliations:
  - id: bu
    name: Boston University
    city: Boston
    state: MA
date: "April 13, 2026"
date-modified: "April 13, 2026"
date-format: long
format:
  docx:
    default: true
---

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include data_cleaning.qmd >}}

{{< include eda.qmd >}}

{{< include ml_methods.qmd >}}

{{< include skill_gap_analysis.qmd >}}

{{< include career_plan.qmd >}}


## Team Contributions

- **Manjari Kannan** : built the Quarto website structure and navigation, handled data cleaning and preprocessing in PySpark including salary column identification, missing value imputation, and duplicate removal, developed the AI vs Non-AI role classification using keyword matching, conducted exploratory data analysis across salary, industry, and job posting trends, built and evaluated the regression, classification, and clustering models, completed the skill gap analysis, wrote the analysis and interpretation for each section of the report, converted visualizations to interactive Plotly charts, and managed GitHub throughout the project
- **Oscar Quintero** : sourced and formatted the academic references in BibTeX
- **Nicholas Decesaris** : responsible for the final presentation
